C

clearResourceConsumptionCounterAccumulatedValues(UUID, String, String) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Deletes a resource counter values
Cluster authentication is required: IAgentAdminConnection.authenticate(java.util.UUID, java.lang.String, java.lang.String)

close(IAgentAdminConnection) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.client.IAgentAdminConnector
Closes connection with the administration server

Creates or updates a cluster security profile.
createSecurityProfileAddIn(UUID, ISecurityProfileAddIn) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates or updates an allowed add-in of a security profile.
createSecurityProfileApplication(UUID, ISecurityProfileApplication) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates or updates an allowed application of a security profile.
createSecurityProfileComClass(UUID, ISecurityProfileCOMClass) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates or updates an allowed COM class of a security profile.
createSecurityProfileInternetResource(UUID, ISecurityProfileInternetResource) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates or updates an Internet resource of a security profile.
createSecurityProfileUnsafeExternalModule(UUID, ISecurityProfileExternalModule) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates or updates an allowed unsafe external module of a security profile.
createSecurityProfileVirtualDirectory(UUID, ISecurityProfileVirtualDirectory) - Method in interface com._1c.v8.ibis.admin.IAgentAdminConnection
Creates or updates a virtual directory of a security profile.
